hero.name: Rafael Lopes
hero.title: Full-Stack Developer
hero.subtitle: Full web development: high-conversion websites and landing pages, custom systems, and automations with chatbots and AI to boost your business growth.
typingPhrases: I create tailored digital solutions that will work 24/7 for your business.
Stay ahead of the competition with technology and innovation.
Schedule a consultation to transform your digital presence.

about.title: About Rafael Lopes
about.subtitle: Developer passionate about transforming ideas into digital solutions.
about.story1: I work with entrepreneurs who want to bring their ideas to life and turn them into **digital products that actually sell**. My role isn’t just about coding. It’s about **understanding the business**, the context, and what needs to happen for technology to generate **real financial returns**.
about.story2: My background combines **law, entrepreneurship, and development**. This mix taught me to make decisions based on **risk, opportunity, and metrics**, rather than trends or empty promises. That’s why every project starts with a **diagnosis, clear goals, and success criteria** defined together with the client.
about.story3: When I’m not developing projects, I’m studying the market, user behavior, **AI, and automation** to create **competitive advantage**. If your goal is to **grow strategically and predictably**, we’ll get along just fine.
